title: Fix golangci-lint location lookup
body:
See both commits, more fixes for the new CI work

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
Write `None` if there are no user-facing changes, otherwise enter your release note below.
Include "action required" if users need to take action when upgrading.

```release-note

```

comments.body:
This is a fall out from https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/cf021c4ba99116d263c8dd9571bfb5b78c21c88c

cc @kolyshkin

> Nah, the idea of #28760 is to use pre-installed golangci-lint, and only install to ./bin if the one from $PATH is not available or versions differs. This allows skipping installation entirely if the needed version is pre-installed.
> 
> Here we should also do the same (run one from $PATH first and fall back to one from ./bin.

No but that is wrong based on your install logic. The install script removes ./bin if the version matches, as such the the script falls back to $PATH. If ./bin does exists and was created by the installer it means the version $PATH is wrong and must not be used to lint as we lint with the incorrect version then.

> > Nah, the idea of #28760 is to use pre-installed golangci-lint, and only install to ./bin if the one from $PATH is not available or versions differs. This allows skipping installation entirely if the needed version is pre-installed.
> > Here we should also do the same (run one from $PATH first and fall back to one from ./bin.
> 
> No but that is wrong based on your install logic. The install script removes ./bin if the version matches, as such the the script falls back to $PATH. If ./bin does exists and was created by the installer it means the version $PATH is wrong and must not be used to lint as we lint with the incorrect version then.

You are right, the one in ./bin should be preferred!

```diff
diff --git a/hack/golangci-lint.sh b/hack/golangci-lint.sh
index 9e68100685..00dd618c33 100755
--- a/hack/golangci-lint.sh
+++ b/hack/golangci-lint.sh
@@ -10,8 +10,8 @@ set -e
 
 declare -a EXTRA_TAGS
 
-# Prefer the one from $PATH, if available.
-BIN="$(command -v golangci-lint || echo ./bin/golangci-lint)"
+# Prefer the one from ./bin, if available.
+BIN="$(command -v ./bin/golangci-lint golangci-lint | head -1)"
 
 echo "Linting for GOOS=$GOOS"
 case "$GOOS" in
diff --git a/pkg/bindings/generator/generator.go b/pkg/bindings/generator/generator.go
index bb731aa648..79a42f3851 100644
--- a/pkg/bindings/generator/generator.go
+++ b/pkg/bindings/generator/generator.go
@@ -161,7 +161,15 @@ func main() {
                closed = true
 
                // Format file.
-               goimport := exec.Command("../../../bin/golangci-lint", "fmt", out.Name())
+               bin, err := exec.LookPath("../../../bin/golangci-lint")
+               if err != nil {
+                       bin, err = exec.LookPath("golangci-lint")
+                       if err != nil {
+                               fmt.Println(err)
+                               os.Exit(1)
+                       }
+               }
+               goimport := exec.Command(bin, "fmt", out.Name())
                goimport.Stderr = os.Stdout
                if err := goimport.Run(); err != nil {
                        fmt.Println(err)
```
